title: Iridescent Japanese Rice Kaiseki-Course
description: A rich, crumbly, light Japanese dish featuring yellow food colouring, wood-fired-bake, egg-free-friendly, form=kaiseki-course. Perfect for a kaiseki-course meal.

ingredients.name: Wood-fired rice oven temperature
ingredients.notes: Using a wood-fired oven allows for a crispy crust to form on the rice.

instructions: Prepare the Japanese short-grain rice according to package instructions.
In a separate pot, mix the rice vinegar, sakura extract, yellow food colouring, white sugar, and salt to create the sauce.
Preheat the wood-fired rice oven to 220°C.
Transfer the cooked Japanese short-grain rice to the wood-fired rice oven and bake for 15 minutes, or until crispy on the bottom.
Shape the rice into small circular balls using a rice paddle.
Garnish the rice balls with rice bowl garnishes, edible gold dust, and fresh herbs if desired.
Serve the Iridescent Japanese Rice Kaiseki-Course warm or at room temperature, as desired.
